name: workflow
description: | Use when a task is too large for turn-by-turn orchestration and should run through the big-task workflow lane: system-wide changes, large migrations, repo-wide audits, high-confidence verification, or tasks explicitly asking to run a workflow. Claude Code uses native dynamic workflows; Codex, OpenCode, and Grok use the portable workflow adapter. Trigger with /hyperflow:workflow, "run a workflow", "dynamic workflow", "big task", "large migration", "repo-wide audit".
author: jeremylongshore
